underlying_goal: Debug and complete weather integration feature for a Travel Planner app, including fixing API key loading, testing endpoints, updating UI components, writing tests, and managing git branches
friction_detail: Creating the weather branch from master instead of the feature branch caused loss of dashboard and sidebar features, requiring additional cherry-pick recovery work.
brief_summary: User needed to debug weather API integration, update UI weather preview, create tests, and manage git branches; most was achieved but a git branching mistake caused temporary loss of features that had to be recovered.
